text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fortunately, Ines Fujin's injuries amount to little
more than some swelling in her legs, and she
suffers no serious damage. Still, just to be safe,
she heads back home to recuperate for a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making a full recovery, Ines asks me to
teach her how to run in a way that won't result in
her collapsing at the finish line.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm taken aback by her sudden request, but she
might be onto something. We decide to make this
our main goal during summer camp, so she'll be
able to race safely in the upcoming Kikuka Sho.
